message:
feat(cloudflare): rewrite manifest to schema 2.1 and expand operation surface

Major manifest overhaul from ~300 lines to ~1140 lines: adds complete
operation definitions for Zones, DNS records, Workers, Pages, and
Workers KV with proper risk levels, safety tiers, idempotency markers,
input/output schemas, and rate limit annotations.

Connector implementation expanded to match the manifest — adds full CRUD
operations with proper error handling, pagination support, and zone
permission enforcement. Archetypes updated from just "operational" to
include "storage" (for KV operations).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,300 +1,1140 @@
-[format]
-type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
 schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:9c27229d93e604f61542819d0a7e5ddac9609d79f2347184f08b3292e80dd3e5"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.cloudflare"
-name = "Cloudflare"
+name = "Cloudflare Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "Cloudflare connector for Workers, Pages, DNS, KV, and Zones management"
-archetypes = ["operational"]
-homepage = "https://developers.cloudflare.com/api"
+description = "FCP connector for Cloudflare Zones, DNS, Workers, Pages, and Workers KV operations"
+archetypes = [
+    "operational",
+    "storage",
+]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "No durable connector state; configuration and HTTP runtime live only inside the current connector instance."
 
 [zones]
 home = "z:work"
-allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
 allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
-tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
 
 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+]
 optional = []
-forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "system.privileged",
+]
 
-[provides.operations.zones_list]
-summary = "List Cloudflare zones"
-capability = "cloudflare.zones.read"
-risk = "low"
-safety_tier = "safe"
-idempotency = "strict"

 port_allow = [443]
-require_tls = true

+cidr_deny = []
